ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_models" (
  "card_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the card model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the card model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the card model was last updated */,
  "template" TEXT /* Template for the card model */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the card model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facts" (
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact */,
  "card_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card model the fact belongs to */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question text of the fact */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer text of the fact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the fact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the fact was last updated */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image associated with the fact */,
  "audio" TEXT /* Audio associated with the fact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facts_card_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_model_id") REFERENCES card_models ("card_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fact the card is based on */,
  "card_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card model the card belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the card was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the card was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the card for organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the card (e.g., new, learned, forgotten) */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_card_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_model_id") REFERENCES card_models ("card_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_fact_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_id") REFERENCES facts ("fact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cards" (
  "user_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-card association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the card was last reviewed by the user */,
  "last_result" TEXT /* Result of the last review (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  "last_interval" INTEGER /* Last interval between reviews for the user */,
  "next_due" TEXT /* Next date the card is due for review by the user */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the user on the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the card */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card that was reviewed */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the card was reviewed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the review (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  "review_time" REAL /* Time taken to answer the card in seconds */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval between reviews */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the user for the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_tags_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educator_cards" (
  "educator_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator-card association */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the card was created by the educator */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the card was last updated by the educator */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the card set by the educator */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the card by the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_cards_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educator_students" (
  "educator_student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator-student association */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the educator-student relationship */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_students_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_students_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin log */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the action (e.g., user, card, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "user_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user progress */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the progress was recorded */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent by the user on the system */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Milestones achieved by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user based on their performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
